_comment: Canonical cross-language conformance vectors for the tenx_hash pattern hash. The engine (PatternHashEncoder, JUnit PatternHashEncoderConformanceTest) and the MCP TypeScript reimplementation MUST both reproduce every expected value exactly. Do not edit an expected value to fix a failing test: a mismatch means the contract changed and every deployed tenx_hash filter is now inconsistent.
algorithm: xxHash64 (net.openhft:zero-allocation-hashing:0.12, LongHashFunction.xx(), seed 0) over the UTF-8 bytes of the input; 64-bit result serialized big-endian as 8 bytes; encoded base64url (RFC 4648) without padding; always 11 chars.
